source_pr.title: expression: Quit builtin function SLEEP when KILLed.
source_pr.body:
Use cancellation pattern in SLEEP function by making use of
transaction's context. But, it does not quit when Ctrl-C
pressed. Add TODO for future investigation.

Fix #4378 partially

symptoms: mux sync.Mutex // fix data race in ddl test.
failure_signature: mux sync.Mutex // fix data race in ddl test.
fix_pattern: expression: Quit builtin function SLEEP when KILLed.

evidence: evidence: mux sync.Mutex // fix data race in ddl test.
